sections.heading: TL;DR (Too Long; Didn't Read)
content: <ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">
• Agreement: By using UK Apprenticeships, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the App.
• Purpose: Browse and filter apprenticeship vacancies from the UK government's Find an apprenticeship service, and save favourites for easy access.
• No accounts: The App does not require sign-in.
• Vacancy data: Listing information comes from the UK government's Find an apprenticeship service. It may be incomplete or outdated—use the official service to apply.
• Not official: This App is made by us and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the UK government or the Department for Education.
• Favourites: Saved listings are stored on your device and may sync via iCloud. We do not receive them.
• Privacy: See our Privacy Policy.
• Liability: The App is provided "as is." Our liability is limited to the extent permitted by law.
• Law: Governed by the laws of England and Wales.
This summary does not replace the full Terms—read the full text for complete details.

sections.heading: Introduction
content: These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern your use of UK Apprenticeships (the "App", "we", "us"). By installing or using the App, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the App.

The App retrieves apprenticeship vacancy information from the UK government's Find an apprenticeship service and presents it in a simple, filterable view. You can save vacancies as favourites. The App does not offer any other features.
If you have questions about these Terms, contact us.

sections.heading: Your Use of the Services
content: <ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">
• Licence. We grant you a personal, revocable, non-exclusive, non-transferable licence to use the App on devices you own or control, in accordance with these Terms and the App Store rules.
• Personal use. The App is for personal, non-commercial use unless we agree otherwise in writing.
• Requirements. You are responsible for having a compatible device and an internet connection when browsing vacancies.
• No accounts. The App does not require registration or sign-in.
• Favourites. Saved listings are stored on your device using Core Data and may sync to iCloud. This is managed by Apple and subject to Apple's terms.
• Prohibited uses. You may not:
• Use the App for any unlawful purpose
• Interfere with or disrupt the App, the Find an apprenticeship API, or related systems
• Attempt to reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the App except to the extent permitted by law
• Distribute copies of the App without permission
• Remove or alter any copyright or proprietary notices
• Misrepresent the App as an official government service

sections.heading: Vacancy Data and Accuracy
content: Apprenticeship listing information in the App is sourced from the UK government's Find an apprenticeship service via the Display advert API, operated by the Department for Education.
<ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">
• Not a complete or guaranteed source. Vacancies may be withdrawn, filled, or changed on the official service before they update in the App. Data may be incomplete or out of date.

• Apply on the official service. To apply for an apprenticeship, use the official Find an apprenticeship website or the process linked from each listing. This App is for browsing and saving favourites only.
• Not professional advice. The App does not provide careers, employment, or legal advice.

• Third-party terms. Use of the Display advert API is subject to the Department for Education's terms. By using the App, you benefit from our integration with that API; we are responsible for the App, not for the government's data or service availability.

sections.heading: Data Sources and Attribution
content: Vacancy information displayed in the App is retrieved from the UK government's Find an apprenticeship service (Department for Education).

This App is an independent third-party client. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by His Majesty's Government, the Department for Education, or the Education and Skills Funding Agency.

When you browse vacancies, the App communicates with the government's API under terms set by the Department for Education. We present and format that information for use in the App. We do not claim ownership of the underlying vacancy data.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
content: The App and its software, design, text, and graphics are owned by us or our licensors and are protected by intellectual property laws. Except for the limited licence above, no rights are granted to you.
Vacancy content is provided by the Department for Education via the Find an apprenticeship service. Rights in that content remain with the relevant providers.
Apple, iOS, Core Data, iCloud, and other Apple marks are trademarks of Apple Inc.

sections.heading: Third-Party Content and Services
content: <ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">
• No ads. The App does not include third-party advertising.
• Government API. Vacancy data is supplied by the Find an apprenticeship service. We do not control that service and are not responsible for its availability, accuracy, or terms.
• Apple services. The App may use Apple frameworks (for example, Core Data and iCloud). Your use of those services is subject to Apple's terms.
We do not endorse and are not responsible for third-party services you access from the App (for example, the official Find an apprenticeship website when you follow a link to apply).

sections.heading: Pricing, Payment & Refunds
content: If the App is distributed through the Apple App Store, payment processing (including taxes and currency conversion) is handled by Apple. We do not process payments or collect your payment details through the App.
Refunds: Refunds are administered by Apple under App Store policies. To request a refund, use reportaproblem.apple.com. We cannot issue refunds directly.

App Store terms: Your purchase and use are also governed by Apple's applicable terms, including the Standard Licensed Application End User Licence Agreement where relevant. If there is a conflict regarding purchase or licensing, Apple's terms apply for those matters.

sections.heading: Privacy
content: Your use of the App is subject to our Privacy Policy, which explains our minimal data practices. Please read it carefully.

sections.heading: Termination
content: We may suspend or terminate your access to the App if you breach these Terms, if required by law, or if we withdraw or materially change the App. You may stop using and uninstall the App at any time. Upon termination, the licence granted to you ends and you must cease use.

sections.heading: Disclaimers and Limitation of Liability
content: <ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">

• No warranties. The App is provided "as is" and "as available". To the fullest extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties (express or implied), including fitness for a particular purpose, reliability, and accuracy of vacancy data.
• Vacancy limitations. We do not guarantee that listings are complete, current, or still available.
• Your responsibility. You are responsible for safe and lawful use of the App and for verifying vacancy details before applying.

• Limitation. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we will not be liable for any indirect, consequential, special, or punitive damages, or for loss of profits, data, goodwill, or opportunities, arising from your use of the App. Our total aggregate liability for all claims relating to the App shall not exceed the amount you paid (if any) to purchase the App.
• Non-excludable liability. Nothing in these Terms excludes or limits liability where it would be unlawful to do so (for example, for death or personal injury caused by negligence, or for fraud).

sections.heading: Governing Law and Jurisdiction
content: These Terms and any dispute or claim arising out of or in connection with them are governed by the laws of England and Wales, and the courts of England and Wales shall have exclusive jurisdiction. If you are a consumer in another country, you may have mandatory rights under your local laws which remain unaffected.

sections.heading: Changes to These Terms
content: We may update these Terms from time to time. Changes will be effective when posted or when the App notifies you. The "Last updated" date at the top reflects the most recent version. If you continue to use the App after changes take effect, you agree to the updated Terms.

sections.heading: Contact Us
content: If you have questions about these Terms or the App, please contact:
Email: hello@cumuluscoding.com
When emailing us, please include the app name first, followed by your subject in the email's subject line.
For example: UK Apprenticeships - [Your Subject Here]
